    rw [(h_fin.subset (diff_subset _ _)).encard_eq, (h_fin.inter_of_right _).encard_eq,
      ← Nat.cast_one, ← Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_inj,
      ncard_eq_toFinset_card _ (h_fin.subset (diff_subset _ _)),
      ncard_eq_toFinset_card _ (h_fin.inter_of_right _)]
    have h_nd : l.Nodup := h.toIsAltPath.isTrail.edge_nodup
    rw [← List.toFinset_filter_of_nodup _ h_nd, ← List.toFinset_filter_of_nodup _ h_nd,
      List.card_toFinset, List.card_toFinset, inter_comm]
    exact h_len

  rw [h_card, add_assoc, add_comm (M ∩ E(P)).encard, ← add_assoc,
    encard_diff_add_encard_inter (h_fin.subset (inter_subset_right _ _))]

let S := P.edgeSet
  have hS_fin : S.Finite := P.edgeFinite
  have h_ne : P.edge ≠ [] := by
    cases P with
    | nil => cases h.nonempty
    | cons => simp

  let b := P.edge.map (· ∈ M)

  have h_diff : (S \ M).encard = (b.filter not).length := by
    rw [encard_eq_coe_toFinset_card, ← List.length_toFinset_coe_nodup (h.toIsPath.isTrail.edge_nodup.filter _)]
    congr; ext; simp [S, b]

  have h_inter : (S ∩ M).encard = (b.filter id).length := by
    rw [encard_eq_coe_toFinset_card, ← List.length_toFinset_coe_nodup (h.toIsPath.isTrail.edge_nodup.filter _)]
    congr; ext; simp [S, b]

  have h_count : (b.filter not).length = (b.filter id).length + 1 := by
    have h_chain : Chain (· ≠ ·) b := by
      rw [List.chain_map]
      exact List.chain_of_chain_map _ h.toIsAltPath.mem_matching_iff' (by simp)

    have h_start : b.head h_ne = false := by
      simp; intro hm
      exact h.first_not_in ⟨_, hm, P.edge_head_mem_inc_first (List.head_mem_head h_ne)⟩

    have h_end : b.getLast h_ne = false := by
      simp; intro hm
      exact h.last_not_in ⟨_, hm, P.edge_getLast_mem_inc_last (List.getLast_mem_getLast h_ne)⟩

    generalize hb_eq : b = b'
    rw [hb_eq] at h_chain h_start h_end h_ne
    clear hb_eq b S h hS_fin h_diff h_inter
    induction b' with
    | nil => contradiction
    | cons x xs ih =>
      match xs with
      | [] =>
        simp at h_start ⊢; rw [h_start]; rfl
      | y :: ys =>
        simp at h_chain
        have hx : x = false := h_start
        have hy : y = true := by rw [hx] at h_chain; simp at h_chain; exact h_chain.1
        rw [hx, hy]; simp
        refine ih h_chain.2.2 (by simp) ?_ h_end
        cases ys with
        | nil => contradiction
        | cons z zs =>
          simp at h_chain; rw [hy] at h_chain; simp at h_chain
          exact h_chain.2.1.symm

  rw [Set.encard_symmDiff_eq_encard_add_encard_sub_encard_inter hS_fin]
  rw [h_diff, h_inter, h_count]
  rw [← add_assoc, add_comm 1, add_assoc, ← encard_diff_add_encard_inter M S hS_fin]
  rw [add_comm (M \ S).encard, Set.inter_comm]

have hfin : E(P).Finite := P.edgeFinite
  rw [Set.symmDiff_def, Set.encard_union_eq disjoint_sdiff_sdiff]
  rw [← Set.encard_diff_add_encard_inter M E(P), add_assoc, add_right_cancel_iff (E(P).inter_subset_right M |>.trans hfin)]
  rw [encard_diff_eq_length_filter_of_nodup h.toIsPath.edge_nodup]
  rw [encard_inter_eq_length_filter_of_nodup h.toIsPath.edge_nodup]
  norm_cast
  let l := P.edge
  have h_alt : l.Chain' (fun e f ↦ e ∉ M ↔ f ∈ M) := h.mem_matching_iff'
  have h_start : ∀ e, l.head? = some e → e ∉ M := by
    intro e he
    match P with
    | .nil _ => simp at he
    | .cons u f w =>
      simp at he; subst he
      intro hf
      have : u ∈ V(G, M) := ⟨f, hf, by simp⟩
      exact h.first_not_in this
  have h_end : ∀ e, l.getLast? = some e → e ∉ M := by
    intro e he
    obtain ⟨w, f, u, rfl⟩ := h.nonempty.exists_concat
    simp at he; subst he
    intro hf
    have : u ∈ V(G, M) := ⟨f, hf, by simp⟩
    exact h.last_not_in this

  generalize hL : l = L
  rw [hL] at h_alt h_start h_end
  have hne : L ≠ [] := by
    subst hL; cases P with
    | nil => cases h.nonempty
    | cons _ _ _ => simp
  clear h hL hM hfin
  induction L using List.induction with
  | nil => contradiction
  | cons e es IH =>
    specialize h_start e rfl
    simp [h_start]
    cases es with
    | nil => simp
    | cons f fs =>
      rw [List.chain'_cons] at h_alt
      have hf : f ∈ M := h_alt.1.1 h_start
      simp [hf]
      refine IH ?_ ?_ ?_ ?_
      · intro h; rw [h] at hf; simp at h_end; specialize h_end f rfl; contradiction
      · exact h_alt.2
      · intro g hg; rw [List.head?_cons] at hg; inversion hg; subst g;
        rw [List.chain'_cons] at h_alt; exact h_alt.2.1.1 hf
      · exact h_end

have h_nodup : P.edge.Nodup := h.isTrail.edge_nodup
  let l := P.edge
  have h_chain : l.IsChain (fun e f ↦ e ∈ M ↔ f ∉ M) := h.mem_matching_iff'

  have h_head : ∀ e, e ∈ l.head? → e ∉ M := by
    intro e he
    cases P with
    | nil v => simp [WList.edge] at he
    | cons u f w =>
      simp only [WList.edge, List.head?_cons, Option.mem_some_iff] at he
      subst he
      intro hmem
      refine h.first_not_in ⟨f, hmem, ?_⟩
      exact (w.cons_isPath_iff.1 h.toIsPath).2.1.1

  have h_last : ∀ e, e ∈ l.getLast? → e ∉ M := by
    intro e he
    obtain ⟨w, f, v, rfl⟩ := P.eq_concat_of_edge_getLast?_eq_some he
    intro hmem
    refine h.last_not_in ⟨f, hmem, ?_⟩
    exact (w.concat_isPath_iff.1 h.toIsPath).2.symm

  have h_count : (l.filter (· ∉ M)).length = (l.filter (· ∈ M)).length + 1 := by
    have h_ne : l ≠ [] := by
      intro he
      have := h.nonempty
      cases P <;> simp [WList.edge] at he ⊢
      contradiction

    induction l with
    | nil => contradiction
    | cons x xs ih =>
      cases xs with
      | nil =>
        specialize h_head x rfl
        simp [h_head]
      | cons y ys =>
        simp at h_chain h_head h_last
        have hx : x ∉ M := h_head
        have hy : y ∈ M := by rw [← h_chain.1]; exact hx
        simp [hx, hy]
        rw [add_right_comm, add_right_cancel_iff]
        apply ih
        · intro h; simp [h] at h_ne
          intro heq; subst heq
          specialize h_last y (List.getLast_singleton y)
          contradiction
        · exact h_chain.2.2
        · intro e he; rw [he]; rw [← h_chain.2.1] at hy; exact hy
        · exact h_last

  rw [symmDiff_def, Set.encard_union_eq_add_encard_of_disjoint disjoint_sdiff_sdiff]
  nth_rw 1 [← Set.diff_union_inter M E(P)]
  rw [Set.encard_union_eq_add_encard_of_disjoint (Set.disjoint_sdiff_inter _ _), add_assoc]
  congr 1

  have h_fin : (E(P)).Finite := P.edgeFinite
  rw [encard_eq_coe_toFinset_card (E(P) \ M), encard_eq_coe_toFinset_card (M ∩ E(P))]
  norm_cast

  rw [← List.count_eq_length_filter, ← List.count_eq_length_filter] at h_count

  convert h_count using 1
  · rw [List.card_toFinset_filter_eq_length_filter_of_nodup h_nodup]
    congr; ext; simp
  · rw [add_left_cancel_iff, List.card_toFinset_filter_eq_length_filter_of_nodup h_nodup]
    congr; ext; simp [and_comm]

let l := P.edge
  have h_ne : l ≠ [] := by
    cases P with
    | nil => intro; cases h.nonempty
    | cons _ _ _ => simp [WList.edge_cons]

  have h_chain := h.mem_matching_iff'

  have h_first_notin : l.head h_ne ∉ M := by
    intro he
    cases P with
    | nil => contradiction
    | cons u e P' => simp [WList.edge_cons] at he; exact h.first_not_in ⟨e, he, rfl⟩

  have h_last_notin : l.getLast h_ne ∉ M := by
    intro he
    have h_inc : P.last ∈ V(G, l.getLast h_ne) := by
      induction P with
      | nil => contradiction
      | cons u e P' ih =>
        simp [WList.edge_cons]
        cases P' with
        | nil v => simp [WList.edge_nil, WList.last_cons]
        | cons v f P'' =>
          simp [WList.edge_cons, WList.last_cons]
          apply ih
          simp [WList.edge_cons]
    exact h.last_not_in ⟨_, he, h_inc⟩

  have h_count : (l.filter (· ∉ M)).length = (l.filter (· ∈ M)).length + 1 := by
    generalize hl : l = L
    rw [hl] at h_chain h_first_notin h_last_notin h_ne
    clear h h_ne
    induction L generalizing l with
    | nil => contradiction
    | cons x xs ih =>
      rw [List.filter_cons, List.filter_cons]
      have hx : x ∉ M := by rw [← List.head_cons] at h_first_notin; exact h_first_notin
      simp only [hx, decide_true, if_true, decide_false, if_false]
      congr 1
      cases xs with
      | nil => simp
      | cons y ys =>
        simp [List.chain_cons] at h_chain
        have hy : y ∈ M := h_chain.1.mp hx
        simp only [List.filter_cons, hy, decide_true, if_true, decide_false, if_false, not_true_eq_false]
        congr 1
        apply ih
        · simp [List.getLast_cons] at h_last_notin; exact h_last_notin
        · exact h_chain.2
        · cases ys <;> simp [List.chain_cons] at h_chain ⊢
          exact h_chain.2.1.not_right.mp (not_not_intro hy)
        · rfl

  let S := P.edgeSet
  have h_nodup : l.Nodup := h.toIsPath.isTrail.edge_nodup
  
  have h_card : (S \ M).encard = (S ∩ M).encard + 1 := by
    rw [encard_eq_length_filter_of_nodup h_nodup, encard_eq_length_filter_of_nodup h_nodup]
    · exact congr_arg Nat.cast h_count
    · intro; rw [mem_diff]; simp
    · intro; rw [mem_inter]; simp

  rw [symmDiff_def, encard_union_eq (disjoint_sdiff_left.mono_right (diff_subset _ _))]
  rw [h_card, add_assoc, ← encard_union_eq disjoint_sdiff_left, diff_union_inter]

let l := P.edge
  have hl_nodup : l.Nodup := h.toIsPath.isTrail.edge_nodup
  have hl_chain : l.IsChain (fun e f ↦ e ∉ M ↔ f ∈ M) := h.mem_matching_iff'
  have hl_ne : l ≠ [] := by cases P <;> simp_all [WList.edge, h.nonempty]

  have h_head : l.head hl_ne ∉ M := by
    intro he
    refine h.first_not_in ⟨_, he, ?_⟩
    cases P <;> simp_all [WList.edge]

  have h_last : l.getLast hl_ne ∉ M := by
    intro he
    refine h.last_not_in ⟨_, he, ?_⟩
    obtain ⟨u, v, huv⟩ := h.toIsPath.isWalk.mem_edge_getLast hl_ne
    simp [huv]

  have h_count : (l.filter (· ∉ M)).length = (l.filter (· ∈ M)).length + 1 := by
    induction l with
    | nil => contradiction
    | cons e es ih =>
      cases es with
      | nil =>
        simp only [List.filter_cons, List.filter_nil, List.length_singleton, List.length_nil, zero_add]
        rw [if_pos h_head]
      | cons f fs =>
        simp only [List.chain_cons] at hl_chain
        have hf : f ∈ M := hl_chain.1.mp h_head
        have hfs_ne : fs ≠ [] := by
          rintro rfl
          rw [List.getLast_cons_cons, List.getLast_singleton] at h_last
          contradiction
        have h_fst_fs : fs.head hfs_ne ∉ M := by
          cases fs <;> try contradiction
          simp only [List.chain_cons] at hl_chain
          exact (iff_false_left hf).mp (iff_comm.mp hl_chain.2.1)
        have h_lst_fs : fs.getLast hfs_ne ∉ M := by
          rwa [List.getLast_cons_cons] at h_last
        specialize ih hfs_ne hl_chain.2.pop h_fst_fs h_lst_fs
        simp [h_head, hf, ih]

  rw [Set.symmDiff_def, encard_union_eq_add_encard_diff_of_disjoint]
  · rw [encard_diff_eq_encard_sub_encard_inter (Set.inter_subset_left _ _)]
    · have h_inter_card : (M ∩ E(P)).encard = (l.filter (· ∈ M)).length := by
        rw [encard_eq_coe_toFinset_card, ←List.card_toFinset, ←List.toFinset_filter,
          List.card_eq_length_of_nodup (hl_nodup.filter _)]
        · congr; ext; simp [List.mem_filter, and_comm]
        · exact P.edgeFinite
      have h_diff_card : (E(P) \ M).encard = (l.filter (· ∉ M)).length := by
        rw [encard_eq_coe_toFinset_card, ←List.card_toFinset, ←List.toFinset_filter,
          List.card_eq_length_of_nodup (hl_nodup.filter _)]
        · congr; ext; simp [List.mem_filter]
        · exact P.edgeFinite
      rw [h_inter_card, h_diff_card, h_count]
      exact tsub_add_cancel_of_le (self_le_add_right _ _)
    · exact (encard_le_card P.edgeFinite).trans_lt (WithTop.coe_lt_top _) |>.ne
  · rw [Set.disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty]
    exact Set.inter_diff_self _ _

let l := P.edge
  have h_nodup : l.Nodup := h.toIsPath.isTrail.edge_nodup
  have h_chain : l.IsChain (fun e f ↦ e ∉ M ↔ f ∈ M) := h.mem_matching_iff'

  have h_head : ∀ e ∈ l.head?, e ∉ M := by
    cases P <;> simp [WList.edge]; intro _ h; subst h; intro m; exact h.first_not_in ⟨_, m, by left; rfl⟩

  have h_last : ∀ e ∈ l.getLast?, e ∉ M := by
    intro e he m; exact h.last_not_in ⟨_, m, P.mem_incidence_last e he⟩

  have h_cnt : l.countP (· ∉ M) = l.countP (· ∈ M) + 1 := by
    have h_ne : l ≠ [] := by
      intro he; have := h.nonempty; cases P <;> simp [WList.edge] at *; contradiction
    
    suffices ∀ L, L.length ≤ l.length → L ≠ [] → L.IsChain (fun e f ↦ e ∉ M ↔ f ∈ M) → 
        (∀ e ∈ L.head?, e ∉ M) → (∀ e ∈ L.getLast?, e ∉ M) → 
        L.countP (· ∉ M) = L.countP (· ∈ M) + 1 from this l (le_refl _) h_ne h_chain h_head h_last
        
    intro L; induction L.length using Nat.strong_induction_on generalizing L with | h n ih =>
    intro hlen hne hch hhd hlst
    cases L with
    | nil => contradiction
    | cons x xs =>
      cases xs with
      | nil => have := hhd _ rfl; simp [this]
      | cons y zs =>
        have hx : x ∉ M := hhd _ rfl
        simp only [List.isChain_cons_cons] at hch
        have hy : y ∈ M := by rwa [← hch.1]
        have hzs_ne : zs ≠ [] := fun h => by subst h; simp at hlst; specialize hlst y rfl; contradiction
        simp [List.countP_cons, hx, hy, add_assoc]
        apply ih zs (by simp at hlen; exact Nat.le_trans (Nat.le_add_left _ _) hlen) 
          (by simp at hlen; exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_add_of_pos_right (by decide)) hlen) hzs_ne hch.2.2
        · intro z hz; simp at hz; subst hz; rwa [iff_not_comm, ← hch.2.1]
        · exact hlst

  have h_fin : E(P).Finite := P.edgeFinite.toFinset.finite_toSet
  rw [Set.symmDiff_def, Set.sup_eq_union, encard_union_eq (Set.disjoint_sdiff_left.mono_right (Set.diff_subset _ _))]
  conv_rhs => rw [← Set.diff_union_inter M E(P), encard_union_eq (Set.disjoint_sdiff_left.mono_right (Set.inter_subset_right _ _))]
  rw [encard_eq_coe_toFinset_card (h_fin.diff _), encard_eq_coe_toFinset_card (h_fin.inter _)]
  rw [← List.countP_eq_card_toFinset_filter h_nodup, ← List.countP_eq_card_toFinset_filter h_nodup]
  norm_cast; exact h_cnt

let l := P.edge
  have hne : l ≠ [] := by
    intro he
    obtain ⟨u, rfl⟩ := P.eq_nil_of_edge_eq_nil he
    exact h.nonempty.ne_nil rfl
  have h_nodup : l.Nodup := h.toIsPath.isTrail.edge_nodup
  have h_len : (l.filter (· ∉ M)).length = (l.filter (· ∈ M)).length + 1 := by
    have h_chain : l.Chain' (fun e f ↦ e ∉ M ↔ f ∈ M) := h.mem_matching_iff'
    have h_start : l.head hne ∉ M := by
      intro he
      obtain ⟨u, e, tail, rfl⟩ := P.exists_eq_cons_of_edge_ne_nil hne
      exact h.first_not_in (mem_augment_iff.mpr ⟨e, by simpa using he, (WList.cons_isPath_iff.mp h.toIsPath).2.1⟩)
    have h_end : l.getLast hne ∉ M := by
      intro he
      exact h.last_not_in (mem_augment_iff.mpr ⟨_, he, WList.mem_endpoint_last_edge h.toIsPath hne⟩)
    suffices ∀ l, l.Chain' (fun e f ↦ e ∉ M ↔ f ∈ M) → l ≠ [] → l.head (by simp) ∉ M → l.getLast (by simp) ∉ M →
        (l.filter (· ∉ M)).length = (l.filter (· ∈ M)).length + 1 from
      this l h_chain hne h_start h_end
    intro l hc hn hh hl
    induction l using List.induction_with_singleton with
    | nil => contradiction
    | singleton x => simp [hh]
    | cons_cons x y tl IH =>
      simp at hh
      have hy : y ∈ M := (List.chain'_cons.mp hc).1.mp hh
      simp [hh, hy, add_right_comm]
      apply IH
      · exact (List.chain'_cons.mp hc).2.1
      · simp
      · rw [List.chain'_cons, List.chain'_cons] at hc
        simp only [List.head_cons]
        rw [iff_false_left (not_not.mpr hy)] at hc
        exact hc.2.1.not_right
      · exact hl
  rw [encard_symmDiff_eq_encard_diff_add_encard_diff, ← diff_union_inter M E(P),
    encard_union_eq (disjoint_diff_inter _ _), add_assoc, encard_diff_eq_coe_toFinset_card P.edgeFinite,
    encard_inter_eq_coe_inter_card P.edgeFinite]
  norm_cast
  rw [← List.length_filter_not_mem_eq_card_diff h_nodup, ← List.length_filter_mem_eq_card_inter h_nodup,
    h_len]

let l := P.edge
  have hne : l ≠ [] := h.nonempty.ne_nil
  
  -- The edges alternate between not-in-M and in-M
  have h_chain : l.IsChain (fun e f ↦ e ∉ M ↔ f ∈ M) := by
    convert h.mem_matching_iff using 3
    rw [iff_not_comm, iff_comm (a := _ ∈ M)]

  -- The first edge is not in M
  have h_head : l.head hne ∉ M := by
    intro he
    cases P with
    | nil => contradiction
    | cons u e P' => 
      apply h.first_not_in
      -- e is incident to u (P.first). Since e ∈ M, u ∈ V(G, M).
      -- We assume the graph API supports V(G, M) definition or incidence logic here.
      refine ⟨e, he, ?_⟩
      simp only [WList.cons_edge]
      -- Justification depends on specific Graph library API for V(G, M)
      -- usually V(G, M) = ⋃_{e ∈ M} e.
      -- P is a walk, so e is incident to u.
      sorry 

  -- The last edge is not in M
  have h_last : l.getLast hne ∉ M := by
    intro he
    apply h.last_not_in
    -- Similarly, last edge incident to last vertex.
    refine ⟨l.getLast hne, he, ?_⟩
    sorry

  -- Number of edges not in M is one more than edges in M
  have h_count : (l.filter (· ∉ M)).length = (l.filter (· ∈ M)).length + 1 := by
    induction l generalizing hne with
    | nil => contradiction
    | cons e es ih =>
      by_cases hes : es = []
      · subst hes; simp at h_head; simp [h_head]
      · have nes : es ≠ [] := hes
        simp only [List.filter_cons, List.length_cons]
        simp at h_chain
        obtain ⟨he_es, hchain_es⟩ := h_chain
        -- e ∉ M
        rw [if_pos h_head]
        -- e ∉ M ↔ es.head ∈ M, so es.head ∈ M
        cases es with | nil => contradiction | cons f fs =>
        have hf : f ∈ M := by rwa [h_head, false_iff, not_not] at he_es
        rw [if_neg (not_not_intro hf)]
        -- We must peel off two edges (e, f) to maintain the alternating pattern relative to starts
        by_cases hfs : fs = []
        · subst hfs
          -- l = [e, f]. last is f. f ∈ M. Contradicts h_last.
          have : (e :: f :: []).getLast (by simp) = f := rfl
          rw [this] at h_last
          contradiction
        · have nfs : fs ≠ [] := hfs
          simp only [List.filter_cons, List.length_cons]
          rw [if_pos hf, add_right_inj]
          -- Apply IH to fs
          -- fs starts with g. f ∈ M ↔ g ∉ M. So g ∉ M.
          simp at hchain_es
          obtain ⟨hf_fs, hchain_fs⟩ := hchain_es
          have h_head_fs : fs.head nfs ∉ M := by rwa [hf, true_iff] at hf_fs
          exact ih nfs hchain_fs h_head_fs h_last

  -- Cardinality algebra using encard
  rw [encard_union_eq_add_of_disjoint (Set.disjoint_sdiff_sdiff (y := E(P)))]
  rw [encard_diff_eq_sub_of_subset_encard_finite P.edgeFinite (Set.inter_subset_right _ _)]
  
  have h_in : (M ∩ E(P)).encard = (l.filter (· ∈ M)).length := by
    rw [Set.inter_comm, ← List.filter_mem_eq_inter_toFinset_of_nodup _ h.isTrail.edge_nodup]
    rw [encard_eq_coe_toFinset_card, List.toFinset_card_of_nodup (List.Nodup.filter _ h.isTrail.edge_nodup)]
    rfl
  
  have h_out : (E(P) \ M).encard = (l.filter (· ∉ M)).length := by
    rw [← List.filter_not_mem_eq_diff_toFinset_of_nodup _ h.isTrail.edge_nodup]
    rw [encard_eq_coe_toFinset_card, List.toFinset_card_of_nodup (List.Nodup.filter _ h.isTrail.edge_nodup)]
    rfl
    
  rw [h_in, h_out, h_count]
  generalize k : (l.filter (· ∈ M)).length = n
  -- M - n + (n + 1) = M + 1 in ENat
  rw [add_assoc, ENat.sub_add_cancel_of_le]
  rw [← k, ← h_in]
  exact encard_inter_le_left _ _

let l := P.edge
  have h_nodup : l.Nodup := h.toIsPath.edge_nodup
  have h_chain : l.IsChain (fun e f ↦ e ∉ M ↔ f ∈ M) := h.mem_matching_iff'

  -- Helper lemma: An alternating list starting and ending with edges not in M
  -- has one more edge not in M than edges in M.
  let rec count_diff (L : List β) (chain : L.IsChain (fun e f ↦ e ∉ M ↔ f ∈ M))
      (head_nm : L.head? = some e → e ∉ M) (last_nm : L.getLast? = some e → e ∉ M) :
      (L.filter (· ∉ M)).length = (L.filter (· ∈ M)).length + 1 := by
    match L with
    | [] =>
      -- An empty list cannot satisfy the conditions if called from a valid context where 0 ≠ 1
      -- However, here we just need to prove the equality. 0 = 1 is false.
      -- This case is unreachable for valid AugPaths.
      -- We'll handle l ≠ [] in the main body or assume non-empty P.
      simp
      contradiction
    | [e] =>
      simp at head_nm ⊢
      have : e ∉ M := head_nm rfl
      simp [this]
    | e1 :: e2 :: es =>
      simp at head_nm ⊢
      have he1 : e1 ∉ M := head_nm rfl
      rw [List.isChain_cons] at chain
      have he2 : e2 ∈ M := chain.1.mp he1
      have chain_es := (List.isChain_cons.mp chain.2).2
      
      match es with
      | [] =>
        -- e1 :: e2 :: []. Last is e2. last_nm says e2 ∉ M. Contradiction.
        simp at last_nm
        have : e2 ∉ M := last_nm rfl
        contradiction
      | e3 :: es' =>
        -- Recurse on e3 :: es'
        rw [count_diff (e3 :: es') chain_es]
        · simp [he1, he2]
          ac_rfl
        · intro h
          -- Chain property: e2 ∉ M ↔ e3 ∈ M. Since e2 ∈ M, e3 ∉ M.
          simp [Option.mem_def] at h
          rw [h, List.head_cons]
          have rel := (List.isChain_cons.mp chain.2).1
          simp [he2] at rel
          exact rel
        · intro h
          apply last_nm
          rw [List.getLast?_cons_cons]
          exact h

  -- Apply the helper lemma
  have h_len : (l.filter (· ∉ M)).length = (l.filter (· ∈ M)).length + 1 := by
    -- We assume l is not empty because P is an augmenting path (non-trivial).
    -- If l were empty, P would be a single vertex, and M.encard = M.encard + 1 would fail.
    obtain ⟨u, rfl⟩ | hne := P.exists_eq_nil_or_nonempty
    · have := h.nonempty; contradiction -- Assuming P.Nonempty implies edges or similar
    
    refine count_diff l h_chain (fun he => ?_) (fun he => ?_)
    · have := P.head_mem_edge_head (List.ne_nil_of_mem (Option.mem_def.mp he))
      rw [←Option.mem_def, he] at this
      exact h.first_not_in (mem_V_of_mem_E (by assumption) this)
    · have := P.last_mem_edge_last (List.ne_nil_of_mem (Option.mem_def.mp he))
      rw [←Option.mem_def, he] at this
      exact h.last_not_in (mem_V_of_mem_E (by assumption) this)

  rw [encard_symmDiff_eq_encard_add_encard_sub_encard_inter M P.edgeFinite]
  rw [encard_diff_eq_coe_toFinset_card P.edgeFinite, encard_inter_eq_coe_toFinset_card P.edgeFinite]
  simp only [h_nodup.filter.toFinset_card]
  norm_cast
  exact h_len

let l := P.edge
  have hl_nodup : l.Nodup := h.toIsPath.isTrail.edge_nodup
  
  have hl_ne : l ≠ [] := by
    intro he
    have hn := h.nonempty
    rw [WList.edge_eq_nil_iff] at he
    simp [he] at hn 
    contradiction

  have h_count : l.countP (· ∉ M) = l.countP (· ∈ M) + 1 := by
    have h_chain : l.Chain' (fun e f ↦ e ∉ M ↔ f ∈ M) := h.mem_matching_iff'
    have h_head : l.head hl_ne ∉ M := by
      intro hm
      have hf := h.first_not_in
      exact hf ⟨_, hm, P.edge_head_incident hl_ne⟩
    have h_last : l.getLast hl_ne ∉ M := by
      intro hm
      have hl := h.last_not_in
      exact hl ⟨_, hm, P.edge_last_incident hl_ne⟩
    
    suffices ∀ n l, l.length = n → l ≠ [] → l.Chain' (fun e f ↦ e ∉ M ↔ f ∈ M) →
        l.head (by simp_all) ∉ M → l.getLast (by simp_all) ∉ M →
        l.countP (· ∉ M) = l.countP (· ∈ M) + 1 by
      exact this l.length l rfl hl_ne h_chain h_head h_last
    
    intro n
    induction n using Nat.strong_induction_on with
    | h n IH =>
      intro l hlen hne hchain hhead hlast
      match l with
      | [] => contradiction
      | [e] => simp at hhead ⊢; exact hhead
      | e :: f :: rest =>
        simp at hhead hlen
        rw [List.chain'_cons] at hchain
        have hf : f ∈ M := by simpa [hhead] using hchain.1
        have hrest_ne : rest ≠ [] := by
          intro hr; subst hr; simp at hlast; exact hlast hf
        have hrest_len : rest.length < n := by simp [hlen]; apply Nat.lt_add_of_pos_right; decide
        specialize IH rest.length hrest_len rest rfl hrest_ne hchain.2 
          (by 
            rw [List.chain'_cons] at hchain
            have hc2 := hchain.2
            rw [List.chain'_cons] at hc2
            simp [hf] at hc2
            exact hc2.1
          ) hlast
        simp [hhead, hf, IH]

  rw [symmDiff_def, Set.encard_union_eq disjoint_sdiff_sdiff]
  rw [← encard_diff_add_encard_inter M E(P)]
  rw [add_assoc, add_comm (encard _), add_assoc]
  congr 1
  rw [← P.edgeSet_eq_mem_edge]
  rw [encard_diff_eq_countP_of_nodup hl_nodup, encard_inter_eq_countP_of_nodup hl_nodup]
  norm_cast
  exact h_count

have h_chain := h.mem_matching_iff'
  have h_head : ∀ e, e ∈ P.edge.head? → e ∉ M := fun e he ↦ h.first_not_in (WList.head_mem_vertex_edge he)
  have h_last : ∀ e, e ∈ P.edge.getLast? → e ∉ M := fun e he ↦ h.last_not_in (WList.last_mem_vertex_edge he)
  
  let L := P.edge
  suffices h_len : (L.filter (· ∉ M)).length = (L.filter (· ∈ M)).length + 1 by
    rw [Set.encard_symmDiff_eq_encard_diff_add_encard_diff_inter P.edgeFinite M]
    rw [← WList.edge_eq_edgeSet]
    have h_nodup := h.toIsPath.isTrail.edge_nodup
    rw [encard_eq_coe_toFinset_card, encard_eq_coe_toFinset_card]
    rw [List.toFinset_diff, List.toFinset_inter]
    rw [List.card_toFinset_of_nodup (h_nodup.filter _), List.card_toFinset_of_nodup (h_nodup.filter _)]
    rw [List.length_filter_iff.mpr (p:=fun x=>x∈M) (by intro _ h; simp at h; exact h.2)]
    rw [List.length_filter_iff.mpr (p:=fun x=>x∉M) (by intro _ h; simp at h; exact h.2)]
    rw [h_len, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one, add_assoc, add_comm 1, ← add_assoc]
    convert encard_diff_add_encard_inter (P.edgeFinite.subset (inter_subset_right _ _)) using 2
    ext; simp; tauto

  induction L generalizing h_chain h_head h_last with
  | nil => cases P <;> simp at h; exact h.nonempty
  | cons e es ih =>
    have he : e ∉ M := h_head e rfl
    simp only [List.filter_cons, if_pos he, if_neg he, List.length_cons]
    cases es with
    | nil => simp
    | cons f fs =>
      rw [add_right_cancel_iff]
      have hf : f ∈ M := h_chain.rel_head (by simp) |>.mp he
      simp only [List.filter_cons, if_pos hf, if_neg hf, List.length_cons]
      apply ih
      · exact h_chain.tail.tail
      · intro x hx; rw [List.head?_cons] at hx; subst x
        cases fs with
        | nil => specialize h_last f (by simp); contradiction
        | cons g gs => 
           have := h_chain.tail.rel_head (by simp)
           rw [hf] at this; exact this.mpr rfl
      · exact h_last

let l := P.edge
  let S := P.edgeSet
  have hS_fin : S.Finite := P.edgeFinite
  have h_nd : l.Nodup := h.isPath.edge_nodup

  -- Cardinality of edges in/out of M within P
  let kin := (l.filter (· ∈ M)).length
  let kout := (l.filter (· ∉ M)).length

  have h_count : kout = kin + 1 := by
    have hc : l.IsChain (fun e f ↦ e ∉ M ↔ f ∈ M) := h.mem_matching_iff'
    -- P starts and ends with vertices not in V(M), so first/last edges are not in M
    have h_head : ∀ e, l.head? = some e → e ∉ M := by
      intro e he
      by_contra heM
      have : P.first ∈ V(G, M) := by
        -- e is incident to P.first, and e ∈ M
        exact ⟨e, heM, WList.mem_V_head?_edge he⟩
      exact h.first_not_in this
    have h_last : ∀ e, l.getLast? = some e → e ∉ M := by
      intro e he
      by_contra heM
      have : P.last ∈ V(G, M) := by
        exact ⟨e, heM, WList.mem_V_getLast?_edge he⟩
      exact h.last_not_in this

    -- Induction on the alternating chain
    suffices ∀ l, l.IsChain (fun e f ↦ e ∉ M ↔ f ∈ M) →
        (∀ e, l.head? = some e → e ∉ M) → (∀ e, l.getLast? = some e → e ∉ M) →
        (l.filter (· ∉ M)).length = (l.filter (· ∈ M)).length + 1 from this l hc h_head h_last
    
    intro L hchain hstart hend
    induction L with
    | nil =>
      -- An AugPath cannot be empty of edges because it connects disjoint non-V(M) vertices
      -- but usually implies length ≥ 1. If l is empty, we have 0 = 1, contradiction.
      -- Based on IsAugPath definition, P.Nonempty implies edges or endpoints condition ensures l ≠ []
      -- For this lemma to hold, l cannot be nil.
      simp at hstart
      cases h.nonempty.exists_edge with
      | inl _ => simp at h_nd; contradiction -- P is nil but edges exist? No, handling if P=nil
      | inr ⟨_, _, _, _⟩ => contradiction -- P has edges, so L ≠ nil
    | cons e es ih =>
      cases es with
      | nil => simp
      | cons f fs =>
        simp only [List.filter_cons, List.length_cons]
        have he : e ∉ M := hstart e rfl
        have hf : f ∈ M := (hchain e f (List.chain_cons.mp hchain).1).mp he
        rw [if_pos he, if_pos hf]
        congr 1
        refine ih (List.chain_cons.mp (List.chain_cons.mp hchain).2) ?_ hend
        intro g hg
        -- es = f :: fs. fs starts with g.
        -- f ∈ M. Chain f g implies g ∉ M.
        rw [List.head?_eq_head] at hg <;> [skip; simp]
        subst hg
        exact (List.chain_cons.mp (List.chain_cons.mp hchain).2).1.mpr hf

  -- Convert list lengths to set cardinalities
  have h_kin : (S ∩ M).encard = kin := by
    rw [encard_eq_coe_toFinset_card]
    have : (S ∩ M).toFinset = (l.filter (· ∈ M)).toFinset := by
      ext; simp [S, List.mem_filter]
    rw [this, List.toFinset_card_of_nodup]
    exact h_nd.filter _

  have h_kout : (S \ M).encard = kout := by
    rw [encard_eq_coe_toFinset_card]
    have : (S \ M).toFinset = (l.filter (· ∉ M)).toFinset := by
      ext; simp [S, List.mem_filter]
    rw [this, List.toFinset_card_of_nodup]
    exact h_nd.filter _

  -- Calculation
  rw [Set.symmDiff_def, Set.encard_union_eq_add_encard_disjoint (Set.disjoint_sdiff_sdiff)]
  rw [h_kout, h_count, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one, add_assoc, add_comm kin, ← h_kin]
  rw [Set.diff_eq, Set.inter_comm, ← Set.diff_eq]
  -- M = (M \ (S ∩ M)) ∪ (S ∩ M)
  have hsub : S ∩ M ⊆ M := Set.inter_subset_right _ _
  have hfin : (S ∩ M).Finite := hS_fin.subset (Set.inter_subset_left _ _)
  rw [← Set.encard_diff_add_encard_of_subset hsub hfin]
  rfl

let l := P.edge
  have hnd : l.Nodup := h.toIsPath.isTrail.edge_nodup
  have h_alt : l.Chain (fun e f ↦ e ∉ M ↔ f ∈ M) := h.mem_matching_iff'

  have h_ne : l ≠ [] := by
    intro he; rw [WList.edge_eq_nil_iff] at he
    obtain ⟨v, rfl⟩ := he; exact h.nonempty.ne_nil rfl

  have h_first : ∀ e, e ∈ l.head? → e ∉ M := by
    intro e he; rw [WList.edge_head?_eq_some_iff] at he
    obtain ⟨v, rfl⟩ := he; exact fun hmem ↦ h.first_not_in ⟨_, hmem, rfl⟩

  have h_last : ∀ e, e ∈ l.last? → e ∉ M := by
    intro e he; rw [WList.edge_last?_eq_some_iff] at he
    obtain ⟨v, rfl⟩ := he; exact fun hmem ↦ h.last_not_in ⟨_, hmem, rfl⟩

  have h_cnt : l.countP (· ∉ M) = l.countP (· ∈ M) + 1 := by
    induction l with
    | nil => contradiction
    | cons e es ih =>
      cases es with
      | nil => simp [h_first _ rfl]
      | cons f fs =>
        rw [List.countP_cons, List.countP_cons]
        have he : e ∉ M := h_first _ rfl
        have hf : f ∈ M := (List.chain_cons.mp h_alt).1.mp he
        simp only [if_pos he, if_pos hf, if_neg (not_mem_of_mem_left hf (fun h ↦ h)), if_neg (fun h ↦ h he)]
        rw [ih (List.chain_cons.mp (List.chain_cons.mp h_alt).2) ?_ h_last, add_assoc, add_assoc]
        intro g hg
        rw [List.head?_cons] at hg; injection hg with hg; subst hg
        exact (List.chain_cons.mp (List.chain_cons.mp h_alt).2).1.mp hf

  rw [Set.symmDiff_def, encard_union_eq_add_encard (Set.disjoint_sdiff_sdiff)]
  
  have h_card_diff : (E(P) \ M).encard = l.countP (· ∉ M) := by
    rw [← P.edge_toSet, encard_diff_eq_countP_not_mem hnd]
  
  have h_card_inter : (E(P) ∩ M).encard = l.countP (· ∈ M) := by
     rw [← P.edge_toSet, encard_inter_eq_countP_mem hnd]
  
  rw [h_card_diff, h_cnt, ← h_card_inter, ← add_assoc, encard_diff_add_encard_inter]

have h_fin : E(P).Finite := P.edgeFinite
  have h_nodup : P.edge.Nodup := h.toIsPath.edge_nodup
  rw [symmDiff_def, Set.encard_union_eq disjoint_sdiff_sdiff]
  nth_rw 2 [← union_inter_sdiff_eq_self M E(P)]
  rw [Set.encard_union_eq disjoint_sdiff_inter, add_assoc, add_comm 1, ← add_assoc]
  congr 1
  rw [encard_diff_eq_toFinset_card h_fin, encard_inter_eq_toFinset_card h_fin]
  rw [← List.toFinset_filter_of_nodup h_nodup, ← List.toFinset_filter_of_nodup h_nodup]
  simp only [Finset.card_mk]
  let l := P.edge
  change (l.filter (· ∉ M)).length = (l.filter (· ∈ M)).length + 1
  
  have h_ne : l ≠ [] := by
    intro he
    have := h.nonempty
    cases P with
    | nil v => simp at he; exact this.ne_nil rfl
    | cons u e P' => simp at he
  
  have h_chain : l.IsChain (fun e f ↦ (e ∈ M) ↔ f ∉ M) := h.mem_matching_iff'
  
  have h_ends : (∀ e, l.head? = some e → e ∉ M) ∧ (∀ e, l.getLast? = some e → e ∉ M) := by
    constructor
    · intro e he
      cases P with
      | nil => simp at he
      | cons u f P' =>
        simp only [WList.edge_cons, List.head?_cons, Option.some.injEq] at he
        subst he
        intro hmem
        have : u ∈ V(G, f) := by simp
        exact h.first_not_in (mem_V_of_mem_edge hmem this)
    · intro e he
      intro hmem
      have : P.last ∈ V(G, e) := P.mem_last_edge_of_getLast?_eq he
      exact h.last_not_in (mem_V_of_mem_edge hmem this)

  revert h_chain h_ends h_ne
  generalize heq : P.edge = l
  induction l with
  | nil => intro; contradiction
  | cons e es ih =>
    intro h_chain h_ends _
    have he_not_mem : e ∉ M := h_ends.1 _ rfl
    cases es with
    | nil => simp [he_not_mem]
    | cons f fs =>
      simp only [List.filter_cons, List.length_cons]
      rw [if_pos he_not_mem]
      have hf_mem : f ∈ M := by
        have := (List.chain_cons.1 h_chain).1
        rwa [he_not_mem, false_iff, not_not] at this
      rw [if_pos hf_mem, add_assoc]
      congr 1
      apply ih
      · exact (List.chain_cons.1 (List.chain_cons.1 h_chain).2).2
      · constructor
        · intro g hg; simp at hg; subst hg
          have := (List.chain_cons.1 h_chain).2 f (List.mem_cons_self _ _)
          rwa [hf_mem, true_iff] at this
        · intro g hg; apply h_ends.2; rw [List.getLast?_cons_cons]; exact hg
      · simp

have h_chain : P.edge.IsChain (fun e f ↦ e ∉ M ↔ f ∈ M) := h.mem_matching_iff'
  have h_nodup : P.edge.Nodup := h.toIsPath.isTrail.edge_nodup
  
  obtain ⟨u, e, P', rfl⟩ | h_nil := P.exists_cons_of_nonempty h.nonempty
  · have h_start : e ∉ M := by
      rw [isAugPath_iff, isAltPath_iff, cons_isPath_iff] at h
      exact h.first_not_in <| hM.subset_vertex_set (by assumption) h.1.1.1.2.2
    
    have h_end : (P.edge.getLast (by simp [WList.edge])) ∉ M := by
      rw [isAugPath_iff] at h
      exact fun he ↦ h.last_not_in (hM.subset_vertex_set he (h.1.toIsPath.isWalk.mem_getLast_edge_last _))

    have h_len : (P.edge.filter (· ∉ M)).length = (P.edge.filter (· ∈ M)).length + 1 := by
      let l := P.edge
      let p := fun x ↦ x ∉ M
      have : l.IsChain (fun a b ↦ p a ↔ ¬p b) := h_chain
      have h1 : p (l.head (by simp [l, WList.edge])) := h_start
      have h2 : p (l.getLast (by simp [l, WList.edge])) := h_end
      clear value l
      induction l with
      | nil => contradiction
      | cons x xs ih =>
        simp only [List.filter_cons]
        split_ifs with hx
        · match xs with
          | [] => simp
          | y :: ys =>
            simp only [List.isChain_cons_cons] at this
            have hy : ¬ p y := this.1.mp hx
            rw [List.filter_cons, if_neg hy]
            rw [add_assoc, ih this.2 (by rwa [← this.1] at hy) h2]
        · exact (hx h1).elim

    rw [encard_union_eq_add_encard_of_disjoint disjoint_sdiff_sdiff,
      encard_diff_add_encard_inter M E(P), add_assoc, add_left_cancel_iff]
    rw [← encard_coe_toFinset (Finite.diff P.edgeFinite M), 
      ← encard_coe_toFinset (Finite.inter_of_left P.edgeFinite M)]
    norm_cast
    rw [List.toFinset_inter_of_nodup _ h_nodup, List.toFinset_diff_of_nodup _ h_nodup]
    rw [List.card_toFinset_of_nodup (List.Nodup.filter _ h_nodup)]
    rw [List.card_toFinset_of_nodup (List.Nodup.filter _ h_nodup)]
    exact h_len
  · contradiction

have h_nd : P.edge.Nodup := h.toIsPath.isTrail.edge_nodup
  have h_alt : P.edge.IsChain (fun e f ↦ e ∉ M ↔ f ∈ M) := h.mem_matching_iff'
  have h_head : ∀ e, e ∈ P.edge.head? → e ∉ M := by
    intro e he
    refine h.first_not_in ?_
    cases P with
    | nil => simp at he
    | cons u f P' => simp at he; subst he; exact ⟨_, rfl⟩
  have h_last : ∀ e, e ∈ P.edge.getLast? → e ∉ M := by
    intro e he
    refine h.last_not_in ?_
    obtain ⟨v, hv⟩ := h.toIsPath.last_mem_edge_getLast_of_nonempty h.nonempty he
    exact ⟨_, hv⟩

  let l := P.edge
  have h_cnt : (l.filter (· ∉ M)).length = (l.filter (· ∈ M)).length + 1 := by
    have hne : l ≠ [] := by simpa using h.nonempty
    generalize hlen : l.length = n
    revert l
    induction n using Nat.strong_induction_on with
    | h n ih =>
      intro l hlen hne hchain hhead hlast
      match l with
      | [] => contradiction
      | [e] =>
        simp only [List.filter_cons, List.filter_nil, List.length_singleton, List.length_nil]
        rw [if_pos (hhead _ (List.mem_head?_of_mem (List.mem_singleton_self _)))]
        rw [if_neg (hhead _ (List.mem_head?_of_mem (List.mem_singleton_self _)))]
      | e :: f :: fs =>
        simp only [List.length_cons] at hlen
        rw [List.isChain_cons] at hchain
        have he : e ∉ M := hhead _ (List.head_mem_head? hne)
        have hf : f ∈ M := hchain.1.2 he
        have hfs_ne : fs ≠ [] := by
          intro h; subst h; simp at hlast
          exact hlast _ (List.getLast_mem_getLast? (by simp)) hf
        specialize ih fs.length (by rw [hlen]; apply Nat.lt_trans (Nat.lt_succ_self _) (Nat.lt_succ_self _)) 
          fs rfl hfs_ne (by rw [List.isChain_cons] at hchain; exact hchain.2)
          (fun x hx => by 
             rw [List.head?_eq_head hfs_ne] at hx; simp at hx; subst hx
             rw [List.isChain_cons] at hchain; exact hchain.1.2.2 hf) hlast
        simp [he, hf]
        rw [ih]
        rfl

  rw [Set.symmDiff_def, encard_union disjoint_sdiff_sdiff, 
      encard_diff_add_encard_inter M E(P), add_assoc, add_comm 1, ← add_assoc]
  congr 1
  rw [add_comm]
  have hfin : E(P).Finite := P.edgeFinite
  rw [encard_eq_coe_toFinset_card (hfin.diff _), encard_eq_coe_toFinset_card (hfin.inter _)]
  norm_cast
  trans (P.edge.filter (· ∉ M)).length
  · rw [← List.toFinset_card_of_nodup (List.Nodup.filter _ h_nd)]
    congr; ext; simp [WList.edgeSet]
  trans (P.edge.filter (· ∈ M)).length + 1
  · rw [h_cnt]
  · congr 1
    rw [← List.toFinset_card_of_nodup (List.Nodup.filter _ h_nd)]
    congr; ext; simp [WList.edgeSet]

have h_fin : (M ∩ E(P)).encard < ⊤ := (P.edgeFinite.inter_of_left M).encard_lt_top
  rw [symmDiff_def, encard_union (disjoint_sdiff_sdiff),
    encard_diff_finite_inter P.edgeFinite, encard_diff_finite_inter P.edgeFinite]
  rw [← ENat.coe_add, add_comm, ← add_assoc, ENat.add_sub_cancel_right h_fin, add_comm, ENat.coe_inj]
  
  let l := P.edge
  have h_nd : l.Nodup := h.toIsPath.edge_nodup
  
  -- Reduce set cardinalities to list lengths
  trans (l.filter (· ∉ M)).length
  · rw [encard_eq_coe_toFinset_card, ← List.toFinset_filter_of_nodup h_nd, List.card_toFinset_of_nodup (h_nd.filter _)]
    congr; ext; simp
  rw [eq_comm, encard_eq_coe_toFinset_card, ← List.toFinset_filter_of_nodup h_nd, List.card_toFinset_of_nodup (h_nd.filter _)]
  · congr; ext; simp
  
  -- Prove the counting property by induction on the alternating list
  have h_chain : l.IsChain (fun e f ↦ e ∉ M ↔ f ∈ M) := h.mem_matching_iff'
  have h_start : ∀ e ∈ l.head?, e ∉ M := by
    intro e he
    cases P with
    | nil => simp at he
    | cons u f Q =>
      simp at he; subst he; intro hf
      exact h.first_not_in ⟨f, hf, rfl⟩
  
  -- We perform induction on the list `l`. 
  -- We don't explicitly prove the `last` condition beforehand, but deriving it or contradiction during induction.
  induction l using List.induction_with_singleton with
  | nil =>
    -- P is trivial, but IsAugPath implies P.Nonempty (edges).
    -- If P.edge is empty, P.Nonempty must contradict it.
    simp at h_start -- vacuous
    cases P <;> simp [WList.edge_nil] at *
    case nil => simp [WList.Nonempty] at h; contradiction
    case cons => contradiction
    case concat => contradiction
  | singleton e =>
    simp only [List.filter_cons, List.filter_nil, List.length_singleton, List.length_nil]
    specialize h_start e rfl
    simp [h_start]
  | cons_cons e f es ih =>
    simp only [List.isChain_cons_cons] at h_chain
    specialize h_start e rfl
    have he : e ∉ M := h_start
    have hf : f ∈ M := h_chain.1.mp he
    have h_es_start : ∀ x ∈ es.head?, x ∉ M := by
      intro x hx
      rw [iff_not_comm] at h_chain
      exact h_chain.2.rel_head? hx |>.mpr hf
    rw [List.filter_cons, List.filter_cons, if_pos he, if_neg (not_mem_of_mem_matching hM hf)]
    rw [ih h_chain.2 h_es_start]
    simp

let l := P.edge
  have hne : l ≠ [] := h.nonempty.edge_ne_nil
  have h_nodup : l.Nodup := h.toIsAltPath.isTrail.edge_nodup
  have h_head : l.head hne ∉ M := fun he ↦ h.first_not_in ⟨_, he, WList.head_mem_vertex_head _ hne⟩
  have h_last : l.getLast hne ∉ M := fun he ↦ h.last_not_in ⟨_, he, WList.last_mem_vertex_last _ hne⟩
  have h_cnt : (l.filter (· ∉ M)).length = (l.filter (· ∈ M)).length + 1 := by
    have hc := h.mem_matching_iff'
    induction l generalizing h_head h_last
    case nil => contradiction
    case cons e es ih =>
      match es with
      | [] => simp [h_head]
      | e' :: es' =>
        rw [List.isChain_cons] at hc
        have he' : e' ∈ M := by rwa [← hc.1, iff_true_right h_head]
        match es' with
        | [] => rw [List.getLast_cons_cons] at h_last; contradiction
        | e'' :: es'' =>
          simp [h_head, he']
          apply ih hc.2.2 h_nodup.of_cons.of_cons
          · rw [List.isChain_cons] at hc; simpa [he'] using hc.2.1
          · exact h_last
          · simp
  rw [symmDiff_def, Set.encard_union_eq, Set.encard_diff_add_encard_inter M E(P) (List.finite_toSet l)]
  · rw [← encard_filter_mem_eq_inter h_nodup, ← encard_filter_not_mem_eq_diff h_nodup, h_cnt]
    norm_cast
    rw [add_assoc, add_comm 1, ← add_assoc, add_comm 1]
  · exact Disjoint.inter_left _ (Disjoint.inter_right _ (disjoint_compl_left.mono_right (inter_subset_right _ _)))

let l := P.edge
  have h_chain : l.Chain (fun e f ↦ e ∈ M ↔ f ∉ M) := h.mem_matching_iff
  have h_head : ∀ e, e ∈ l.head? → e ∉ M := by
    intro e he
    have := h.first_not_in
    exact fun hM' ↦ this ⟨e, hM', P.mem_first_of_mem_head? he⟩
  have h_last : ∀ e, e ∈ l.getLast? → e ∉ M := by
    intro e he
    have := h.last_not_in
    exact fun hM' ↦ this ⟨e, hM', P.mem_last_of_mem_getLast? he⟩
  
  have h_cnt : (l.filter (· ∉ M)).length = (l.filter (· ∈ M)).length + 1 := by
    have h_ne : l ≠ [] := fun h_nil ↦ h.nonempty.edge_ne_nil h_nil
    let Q := fun e ↦ e ∈ M
    have h_chain_Q : l.Chain (fun e f ↦ Q e ↔ ¬ Q f) := h_chain
    have h_head_Q : ∀ e, e ∈ l.head? → ¬ Q e := h_head
    have h_last_Q : ∀ e, e ∈ l.getLast? → ¬ Q e := h_last
    clear_value l
    clear h h_chain h_head h_last
    induction l with
    | nil => contradiction
    | cons a tail ih =>
      cases tail with
      | nil =>
        simp only [Q, List.filter_cons, List.filter_nil, List.length_singleton, List.length_nil, zero_add]
        simp at h_head_Q; exact h_head_Q a rfl
      | cons b tail' =>
        have ha : ¬ Q a := h_head_Q a rfl
        have hb : Q b := by
          have := List.Chain.rel_head? h_chain_Q (by simp)
          simpa [ha] using this
        have h_cons : tail'.Chain (fun e f ↦ Q e ↔ ¬ Q f) := by simpa using h_chain_Q
        have h_head' : ∀ e, e ∈ tail'.head? → ¬ Q e := by
          intro e he
          have := List.Chain.rel_head? h_chain_Q.2 he
          simpa [hb] using this
        have h_ne' : tail' ≠ [] := by
           intro h; subst h; simp at h_last_Q; specialize h_last_Q b rfl; contradiction
        specialize ih h_ne' h_cons h_head' h_last_Q
        simp [List.filter_cons, ha, hb, ih, add_assoc]

  have h_fin : P.edgeSet.Finite := P.edgeFinite
  rw [encard_symmDiff_eq_encard_diff_add_encard_diff, Set.encard_diff_add_encard_inter h_fin M]
  rw [encard_eq_coe_toFinset_card (P.edgeFinite.diff M), encard_eq_coe_toFinset_card (P.edgeFinite.inter M)]
  simp only [Set.toFinset_card, Set.toFinset_inter, Set.toFinset_diff, List.card_toFinset_eq_length_filter h.isPath.edge_nodup] at *
  rw [h_cnt, ← add_assoc, withTop_add_left_cancel_iff]
  simp

have h_nodup : P.edge.Nodup := h.toIsPath.isTrail.edge_nodup
  rw [Set.symmDiff_def, Set.encard_union_eq (Set.disjoint_sdiff_sdiff), Set.diff_eq, Set.diff_eq,
    Set.inter_comm E(P), Set.encard_inter_add_encard_diff M, add_assoc]
  congr 1
  rw [← P.edge_toSet, Set.encard_coe_toFinset, Set.encard_coe_toFinset,
    List.toFinset_val, List.toFinset_val, List.card_toFinset_of_nodup h_nodup,
    List.card_toFinset_of_nodup h_nodup, ← Nat.cast_one, ← Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_inj]

  cases P with
  | nil v => simp at h; obtain ⟨_, h, -⟩ := h; cases h
  | cons u e P' =>
    let l := e :: P'.edge
    have h_chain : l.IsChain (fun a b ↦ a ∈ M ↔ b ∉ M) := h.mem_matching_iff
    have h_start : e ∉ M := by
      intro he
      exact h.first_not_in ⟨e, he, by simp⟩
    have h_end : l.getLast (by simp) ∉ M := by
      intro he
      exact h.last_not_in <| (WList.cons u e P').last_mem_edge_end he

    change l.countP (· ∉ M) = l.countP (· ∈ M) + 1
    clear h h_nodup

    induction l with
    | nil => contradiction
    | cons x xs ih =>
      cases xs with
      | nil =>
        simp [h_start]
      | cons y ys =>
        simp only [List.chain_cons, Bool.toProp_eq_true] at h_chain
        obtain ⟨hxy, h_chain⟩ := h_chain
        have hx : x ∉ M := h_start
        have hy : y ∈ M := by rwa [hx, false_iff, not_not] at hxy
        
        simp [hx, hy, add_assoc]
        refine ih h_chain ?_ h_end
        match ys with
        | [] => simp only [List.getLast_cons] at h_end; contradiction
        | z :: zs =>
          simp only [List.chain_cons] at h_chain
          rw [hy, true_iff] at h_chain
          exact h_chain.1

let l := P.edge
  have h_ne : l ≠ [] := by
    intro he
    have := h.nonempty
    cases P <;> simp_all

  have h_head_not_mem : l.head h_ne ∉ M := by
    intro he
    apply h.first_not_in
    cases P with
    | nil => contradiction
    | cons u e P' =>
      simp at he ⊢
      refine ⟨e, he, ?_⟩
      simp

  have h_last_not_mem : l.getLast h_ne ∉ M := by
    intro he
    apply h.last_not_in
    induction P with
    | nil => contradiction
    | cons u e P' ih =>
      simp at he
      cases P' with
      | nil =>
        simp at he ⊢
        exact ⟨e, he, by simp⟩
      | cons _ _ _ =>
        simp at he ⊢
        apply ih
        · simp
        · exact he.2

  have h_chain : l.Chain (fun e f ↦ e ∉ M ↔ f ∈ M) := h.mem_matching_iff'

  have h_count : (l.filter (· ∉ M)).length = (l.filter (· ∈ M)).length + 1 := by
    generalize hl' : l = l'
    rw [hl'] at h_chain h_head_not_mem h_last_not_mem h_ne
    clear hl' l
    induction l' generalizing h_head_not_mem with
    | nil => contradiction
    | cons a as ih =>
      match as with
      | [] =>
        simp [h_head_not_mem]
      | b :: bs =>
        simp at h_chain
        have hb : b ∈ M := h_chain.1.1.mpr h_head_not_mem
        simp [h_head_not_mem, hb]
        apply ih
        · intro; simp_all
        · exact h_chain.2.2
        · exact h_last_not_mem
        · cases bs <;> simp_all; exact h_chain.2.1.mpr hb

  rw [Set.symmDiff_def, Set.encard_union_eq_add_encard_inter_eq_empty (Set.disjoint_sdiff_sdiff),
    Set.inter_comm M, ← Set.encard_diff_add_encard_inter M (Set.toFinite E(P)), add_assoc]
  congr 1
  rw [Set.encard_diff_eq_coe_finset_card _ (Set.toFinite _), Set.encard_inter_eq_coe_finset_card _ (Set.toFinite _)]
  norm_cast
  rw [← List.countP_eq_card_filter_of_nodup _ h.isTrail.edge_nodup,
      ← List.countP_eq_card_filter_of_nodup _ h.isTrail.edge_nodup]
  exact h_count

let l := P.edge
  have h_chain : l.Chain' (fun e f ↦ e ∈ M ↔ f ∉ M) := by
    convert h.mem_matching_iff using 2; rw [iff_comm]
  
  have h_head : ∀ e ∈ l.head?, e ∉ M := by
    cases P with | nil => simp | cons u e P' =>
      intro f hf; simp at hf; subst hf
      intro hm; exact h.first_not_in ⟨_, hm, (P'.inc_first e).1, rfl⟩
  
  have h_last : ∀ e ∈ l.last?, e ∉ M := by
    intro e he
    obtain ⟨u, hu⟩ := List.mem_last?_eq_some.1 he
    have he_inc : u ∈ V(G, e) := by
      induction P with
      | nil => simp at he
      | cons v f P' ih =>
        simp only [WList.edge_cons, List.last?_cons] at he
        cases hP' : P'.edge
        · simp [hP'] at he; subst he; simp [WList.last_cons_of_edge_nil hP']
          exact (P'.inc_first f).2
        · rw [hP'] at he; simp at he
          specialize ih he
          rwa [WList.last_cons_of_edge_ne_nil hP']
    intro hm
    exact h.last_not_in ⟨_, hm, he_inc, rfl⟩

  have h_cnt : (l.filter (· ∉ M)).length = (l.filter (· ∈ M)).length + 1 := by
    have : l ≠ [] := by cases P <;> simp [WList.edge_cons, WList.edge_nil] at *; exact h.nonempty
    induction l with
    | nil => contradiction
    | cons e es ih =>
      simp only [List.filter_cons, List.length_cons]
      have he : e ∉ M := h_head _ (by simp)
      simp [he]
      cases es with
      | nil => simp
      | cons f fs =>
        have hf : f ∈ M := by
          specialize h_chain 0 (by simp); simp at h_chain; rwa [iff_not_comm, ← h_chain]
        simp [hf, add_assoc]
        refine ih ?_ ?_ ?_ (by simp)
        · exact h_chain.tail.tail
        · intro x hx; simp at hx; rw [hx] at h_chain; specialize h_chain 0 (by simp)
          simp at h_chain; rwa [iff_true_left hf] at h_chain
        · simpa using h_last
  
  rw [Set.symmDiff_def, Set.encard_union_eq_add_encard_of_disjoint (Set.disjoint_sdiff_sdiff)]
  rw [encard_diff_add_encard_inter M (E(P)) (Set.toFinite _)]
  rw [add_assoc, add_comm (encard _), ← add_assoc, ← encard_eq_coe_list_length_of_nodup _ h.toIsPath.isTrail.edge_nodup]
  rw [← encard_eq_coe_list_length_of_nodup (l.filter (· ∉ M)), h_cnt]
  · norm_cast
  · convert h.toIsPath.isTrail.edge_nodup.filter (· ∉ M); ext; simp [l]
  · convert h.toIsPath.isTrail.edge_nodup.filter (· ∈ M); ext; simp [l, Set.mem_inter_iff, and_comm]

have h_nodup := h.toIsPath.isTrail.edge_nodup
  let l := P.edge
  have h_chain : l.IsChain (fun x y ↦ x ∉ M ↔ y ∈ M) := h.mem_matching_iff'

  have h_cnt : l.countP (· ∉ M) = l.countP (· ∈ M) + 1 := by
    match P with
    | .nil v => simp at h; cases h.nonempty
    | .cons u e P' =>
      have h_head : l.head?.all (· ∉ M) := by
        intro f hf; rw [Option.mem_def.1 hf _ rfl] at *
        exact h.first_not_in <| (P.mem_incidence_first_of_head?_edge_eq hf).mem_vertex_of_mem_edge (by assumption)
      have h_last : l.getLast?.all (· ∉ M) := by
        intro f hf
        exact h.last_not_in <| (P.mem_incidence_last_of_getLast?_edge_eq hf).mem_vertex_of_mem_edge (by assumption)
      have h_ne : l ≠ [] := by simp [l]
      revert h_chain h_head h_last h_ne
      induction l with
      | nil => simp
      | cons x xs ih =>
        intro h_chain h_head h_last h_ne
        cases xs with
        | nil =>
          simp only [List.countP_singleton, Option.mem_def, Option.some.injEq, forall_eq'] at *
          rw [if_pos h_head, if_neg h_head]
        | cons y ys =>
          simp only [List.countP_cons]
          have hx : x ∉ M := Option.mem_def.1 h_head _ rfl
          rw [List.isChain_cons_cons] at h_chain
          have hy : y ∈ M := h_chain.1.1.mpr hx
          rw [if_pos hx, if_neg hy, add_assoc, ih h_chain.2]
          · simp [iff_not_comm] at h_chain; exact h_chain.1.2.mp hy
          · exact h_last
          · simp

  rw [encard_symmDiff_eq_encard_diff_add_encard_diff]
  have : (E(P) \ M).encard = (E(P) ∩ M).encard + 1 := by
    simp only [Set.encard_coe_eq_nat]
    norm_cast
    rw [← h_nodup.countP_eq_length_filter (· ∉ M), ← h_nodup.countP_eq_length_filter (· ∈ M)]
    exact h_cnt
  rw [this, add_assoc, add_comm (encard (E(P) ∩ M)), ← add_assoc, ← encard_union_eq_add_encard]
  · rw [diff_union_inter]
  · exact disjoint_sdiff_left

let l := P.edge
  have hl : l ≠ [] := by
    cases P with
    | nil => simp at h; contradiction
    | cons => simp [WList.edge]

  have h_count : (l.filter (· ∉ M)).length = (l.filter (· ∈ M)).length + 1 := by
    have h_chain : l.IsChain (fun e f ↦ e ∉ M ↔ f ∈ M) := h.mem_matching_iff'
    have h_head : l.head (by simp [hl]) ∉ M := by
      obtain ⟨u, e, P', rfl⟩ := h.nonempty.exists_eq_cons
      exact h.first_not_in ⟨e, by simp [WList.edge], h.toIsPath.isWalk.cons_inc.1⟩
    have h_last : l.getLast (by simp [hl]) ∉ M := by
      obtain ⟨P', v, e, u, rfl⟩ := h.nonempty.exists_eq_concat
      simp only [WList.edge, WList.concat_edge, List.getLast_append, List.getLast_singleton]
      rw [WList.concat_last] at h
      exact h.last_not_in ⟨e, by simp [WList.edge], h.toIsPath.isWalk.concat_inc.2⟩
    generalize hlen : l.length = n
    induction n using Nat.strong_induction_on generalizing l with
    | h n ih =>
      match l with
      | [] => contradiction
      | [x] => simp [h_head]
      | x :: y :: zs =>
        simp only [List.length_cons, add_right_inj] at hlen
        simp only [List.isChain_cons_cons] at h_chain
        have hx : x ∉ M := h_head
        have hy : y ∈ M := h_chain.1.1 hx
        simp [hx, hy]
        have h_zs_ne : zs ≠ [] := fun h => by subst h; simp at h_last; contradiction
        apply ih zs.length (by simp [hlen]; exact Nat.lt_add_of_pos_right (by simp)) zs rfl h_zs_ne h_chain.2 _ h_last
        simp only [List.head_cons]
        intro hz; exact h_chain.1.2 hz hy

  rw [symmDiff_def, encard_union_eq disjoint_sdiff_sdiff]
  rw [Set.diff_eq E(P), Set.inter_eq E(P), ← List.filter_toSet,
      List.encard_toSet_eq_length (List.nodup_filter _ h.isTrail.edge_nodup), h_count]
  rw [← List.encard_toSet_eq_length (List.nodup_filter _ h.isTrail.edge_nodup),
      List.filter_toSet, ← Set.inter_eq, inter_comm, add_assoc,
      ← encard_union_eq (disjoint_sdiff_inter _ _) (inter_subset_right _ _), diff_union_inter]
